==========
Attributes
==========

@[reducible] def f := 12

@[inline] instance : Foo := ⟨7⟩

@[simp] theorem twotwo : 2 = 2 := rfl

@[inline] constant FooBar : Nat

---

(module
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number)))
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      type: (identifier)
      body: (anonymous_constructor
        (number))))
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      type: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))
      body: (identifier)))
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (constant
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))))

===================
Multiple Attributes
===================

@[reducible, inline] def f := 12

---

(module
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

======================
Dotted Name Attributes
======================

@[foo.bar baz.quux] def f := 12

---

(module
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

=================
Missing Attribute
=================

@[] def f := 12

---

(module
  (declaration
    (attributes
      name: (identifier
        (MISSING _identifier)))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

================
Extern Attribute
================

@[extern "foo"] def f := 12

---

(module
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      extern: (string))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

==============================
Explicit Attribute Declaration
==============================

attribute [reducible] f
attribute [simp, inline] Foo

---

(module
  (attribute
    (identifier)
    (identifier))
  (attribute
    (identifier)
    (identifier)
    (identifier)))

==========================
Explicit Attribute Removal
==========================

attribute [-reducible] f
attribute [simp, -inline, -reducible] Foo

---

(module
  (attribute
    name: (identifier)
    term: (identifier))
  (attribute
    name: (identifier)
    name: (identifier)
    name: (identifier)
    term: (identifier)))

====================================
Empty Explicit Attribute Declaration
====================================

attribute [] f

---

(module
  (attribute
    (identifier
      (MISSING _identifier))
    (identifier)))

======================
Partial With Attribute
======================

@[reducible] partial def f := 12

---

(module
  (declaration
    attributes: (attributes
      name: (identifier))
    (definition
      name: (identifier)
      body: (number))))

==============
Inductive Type
==============

inductive FooBar where
  | foo : FooBar
  | bar.baz : FooBar
  | spam : Nat → FooBar
  | quux {T: Type} [Add T] (x y : Nat) : Nat → FooBar

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier)))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (binders
        (implicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier))
        (instance_binder
          type: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier)))
        (explicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier)))
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier)))))

==============================
Inductive Type No Constructors
==============================

inductive Foo

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)))

==============================
Inductive Type With Parameters
==============================

inductive Foo (F : Type) | x (foo : F)

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (explicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (binders
        (explicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier))))))

=======================
Inductive Type One Line
=======================

inductive Bit | bit0 | bit1

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))))

================================
Inductive Type Superfluous Where
================================

inductive Bit where | bit0 | bit1

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))))

========================
Inductive Type With Type
========================

inductive Foo : Bar

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    type: (identifier)))

==========================
Inductive Type Colon Equal
==========================

inductive Foo :=
| Bar

---

(module
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))))

====================
Class Inductive Type
====================

class inductive FooBar where
  | foo : FooBar
  | bar.baz : FooBar
  | spam : Nat → FooBar
  | quux {T: Type} [Add T] (x y : Nat) : Nat → FooBar

---

(module
  (class_inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier)))
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier)
      binders: (binders
        (implicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier))
        (instance_binder
          type: (application
            name: (identifier)
            arguments: (identifier)))
        (explicit_binder
          name: (identifier)
          name: (identifier)
          type: (identifier)))
      type: (arrow
        domain: (identifier)
        codomain: (identifier)))))

=================
Inline Namespaced
=================

def foo.bar.baz := 12

structure Foo.Bar.Baz where
  x : Nat

class Foo.Bar.Baz.Quux where
  x : Nat

instance Spam.Eggs : Foo.Bar.Baz.Quux where
  x := 3

theorem Foo.Bar.Baz.Quux.Cheese : 2 = 2 := rfl

inductive A.B | C

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (number))
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)))
  (structure
    name: (identifier)
    fields: (structure_field
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)))
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (projection
      term: (identifier)
      name: (identifier))
    body: (where_decl
      (identifier)
      (number)))
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))
    body: (identifier))
  (inductive
    name: (identifier)
    constructors: (constructor
      name: (identifier))))
